justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but it leaves the SecurityConfig extending the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with only a comment placeholder instead of a proper migration. It also introduces spurious churn by removing the junit dependency entirely while leaving a broken empty dependency block in pom.xml, and fails to update the test imports consistently (e.g., TestDesignPizzaController still uses org.junit.Test instead of org.junit.jupiter.api.Test in the import statement despite the annotation change).
